project_type: React Vite SPA with Firebase backend
test_framework: None configured (no test dependencies in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' to confirm no compilation errors. Manual testing required for runtime behavior.
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install npm packages. No test suite exists.
key_patterns: Single-file React app (App.jsx ~7000+ lines). Export functions (exportSingleProject, exportAllData) are defined as local functions inside the WorkflowApp component. Import functions (handleImport, importAllData) read JSON files and restore state. Images in workspace have shape: { id, x, y, width, height, url (Firebase Storage URL), groupId, workspaceId }. Firebase Storage uploads via imageStorageService.js (uploadImage, deleteImage). The persistenceService.js provides hydrateProject() which assembles full project data including all workspaces and tasks.
directory_structure: src/ - all source (App.jsx is the monolith component, services split out to separate files). public/ - static assets. No tests directory exists.
